title: Analytics - Events are gathered if user is logged in
scenario: Analytics event count for device serial number does not increment on Firebase after triggering device_added event in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log into the app with a valid user account.
4. Trigger an analytics event such as device_added by pairing or connecting a Poly Bluetooth audio device to the app.
5. Wait several hours (e.g., overnight) for the analytics event counts to propagate and update on Firebase.
6. Access the Firebase console for the Poly Studio Mobile app project.
7. Navigate to the Analytics or Events section in Firebase.
8. Locate the event (e.g., device_added) and verify that the event count for the connected device's serial number has increased.
expected: The event count for the triggered analytics event (e.g., device_added) associated with the device's serial number increases in Firebase after the propagation delay.
